Class Home

java.lang.Object
sims.world.Loc
sims.world.Home
All Implemented Interfaces:
Location
public class Home extends Loc implements Location
Represents a home location in the Sims world. A Home is a specialized type of Loc that contains multiple HomeLocation areas (such as rooms or sections of the house).

This class manages the relationship between a home and its sub-locations, and defines how Sims move into the home.

  • Constructor Details

    • Home

      public Home(String homeName)
      Constructs a new Home with the specified name.
      Parameters:
      homeName - the name of the home

  • Method Details

    • getHomeLocation

      public List<HomeLocation> getHomeLocation()
      Returns the list of sub-locations that belong to this home.
      Returns:
      a list of HomeLocation objects

    • addHomeLocation

      public void addHomeLocation(HomeLocation location)
      Adds a sub-location to this home and sets its parent reference.
      Parameters:
      location - the HomeLocation to add

    • moveTo

      public void moveTo(Sim sim)
      Moves a Sim into this home. The Sim is removed from its current location, placed into the first available HomeLocation, and added to the list of Sims present in this home if not already included.
      Specified by:
      moveTo in interface Location
      Specified by:
      moveTo in class Loc
      Parameters:
      sim - the Sim to move into the home
